name: FLAAK TD
short_description: Each day the US air force send wave after wave of bomber to crush our War machine. You are one anti-aircraft Brigade commander equiped with flakwierling 38 and the awesome Flak 88mm gun. Install them wisely and shoot all the bombers! Protect our factories and the fatherland!
detailed_description:
FLAAK TD is a special kind of tower defense game. It is a AIR TOWER DEFENSE GAME.

During the second world war, Germany was under constant aerial bombardment by the british and US air force. The bombing had one main objective: destroy the WAR MACHINE!

You are Oberst in the Werhmacht and you command one of the numerous anti-aircraft brigade in charge of the air defense of several strategic site such as factories, Bridges or battleship.

Ennemies:

You will face waves (RAID) of light bomber such as SBD Dauntless armed with one 500 LBS bomb, the powerful twin engine medium bomber B26 Marauder and the huge B17 4 engine heavy bomber all charged with 500LBS bombs.

The light bomber are faster but cause less damage than the medium bomber. If the bombers succeeded to destroy the strategic site. The game will be over for you Oberst!

Hopefully, you have an arsenal to defend the site:

You can install:

  • Light anti aircraft gun such as FlakVierling 28 for rapid fire but short range and low damage.

  • Heavy anti-aircraft gun such as Flak 88mm gun with long range and high damage.

  • You can also call 3 powerful fighter planes Focke wulf 190 from the nearest jagdgeschawader, they shoot down all planes in front of them!

  • Finally, you are also able to order fast reparation by the reparation team.

  • Don' forget to send the reparation team when it is needed.

The game ask you to make choice and manage your ressource wisely in order to see the end of the raid.

The more planes you shoot the more money and power will be given to you in order to call reinforcements.

It is your duty to defend at all cost our factories against the allies raid!

 For the fatherland! GOOD LUCK Oberst!
